option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:id="@+id/main" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" tools:context=".MainActivity">
<!-- Encabezado centrado --> <TextView android:id="@+id/textView" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="EJEMPLO LOGIN" android:textAlignment="center" android:textSize="34sp" android:textStyle="bold" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" android:layout_marginTop="48dp" />
<!-- Campo para el nombre --> <EditText android:id="@+id/editFirstName" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="32dp" android:layout_marginTop="24dp" android:layout_marginEnd="32dp" android:hint="Nombre" android:imeOptions="actionNext" android:inputType="textPersonName" android:padding="12dp" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintHorizontal_bias="0.0" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/textView" />
<EditText android:id="@+id/editLastName" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="32dp" android:layout_marginTop="24dp" android:layout_marginEnd="32dp" android:hint="Apellido" android:imeOptions="actionDone" android:inputType="textPersonName" android:padding="12dp" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintHorizontal_bias="0.0" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/editFirstName" />
<!-- Botón de login -->
<!-- Texto que muestra el saludo --> <Button android:id="@+id/btnLogin" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="80dp" android:text="Ingresar" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/editLastName" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/textGreeting" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="" android:textAppearance="?attr/textAppearanceBody1" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/btnLogin" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" android:layout_marginTop="24dp" />
<EditText android:id="@+id/editCarnet" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:ems="10" android:inputType="text" android:text="Carnet" tools:layout_editor_absoluteX="32dp" tools:layout_editor_absoluteY="257dp" />
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:id="@+id/main" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" tools:context=".MainActivity">
<!-- Encabezado centrado --> <TextView android:id="@+id/textView" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="EJEMPLO LOGIN" android:textAlignment="center" android:textSize="34sp" android:textStyle="bold" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" android:layout_marginTop="48dp" />
<!-- Campo para el nombre --> <EditText android:id="@+id/editFirstName" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="32dp" android:layout_marginTop="24dp" android:layout_marginEnd="32dp" android:hint="Nombre" android:imeOptions="actionNext" android:inputType="textPersonName" android:padding="12dp" android:autofillHints="givenName" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintHorizontal_bias="0.0" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/textView" />
<EditText android:id="@+id/editLastName" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="32dp" android:layout_marginTop="24dp" android:layout_marginEnd="32dp" android:hint="Apellido" android:imeOptions="actionNext" android:inputType="textPersonName" android:padding="12dp" android:autofillHints="familyName" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintHorizontal_bias="0.0" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/editFirstName" />
<!-- Campo para el carnet (posicionado entre apellido y botón) --> <EditText android:id="@+id/editCarnet" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="32dp" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:layout_marginEnd="32dp" android:hint="Carnet" android:inputType="text" android:padding="12dp" android:autofillHints="username" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/editLastName" />
<!-- Botón de login --> <Button android:id="@+id/btnLogin" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:text="Ingresar" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/editCarnet" />
<!-- Texto que muestra el saludo --> <TextView android:id="@+id/textGreeting" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="" android:textAppearance="?attr/textAppearanceBody1" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/btnLogin" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" android:layout_marginTop="24dp" />
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>
